name: OPPO F21s Pro 5G
description: OPPO F21s Pro 5G is a powerful device with stunning camera and fast 5G connectivity. Features 64MP camera, 4500mAh battery, and 33W fast charging.

name: WRISTIO HD Bluetooth Calling Smart Watch
description: Minix watches are exclusively designed for fitness enthusiasts. Features HD display, Bluetooth calling, heart rate monitor, and 7-day battery life.

name: Dell Inspiron 3511 Laptop
description: Dell Inspiron 3511 11th Generation Intel Core i5 processor, 8GB RAM, 512GB SSD, Windows 11, 15.6 inch FHD display. Perfect for work and study.

name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Headphones
description: Industry-leading noise canceling headphones with 30-hour battery life, multipoint connection, and crystal clear hands-free calling. Foldable design for easy carrying.

name: Samsung 65 inch 4K Smart TV
description: Samsung Crystal 4K UHD Smart TV with Alexa built-in, Motion Xcelerator, Object Tracking Sound, and boundless design. Stunning picture quality for movies and gaming.

name: Nike Air Max 270 Shoes
description: Nike Air Max 270 features Nike's biggest heel Air unit for all-day comfort. Breathable mesh upper and foam midsole provide a lightweight, cushioned feel.

name: Instant Pot Duo 7-in-1 Electric Pressure Cooker
description: 7-in-1 multi-use programmable pressure cooker, slow cooker, rice cooker, steamer, saute pan, yogurt maker and warmer. 6 quart capacity, stainless steel.
